question: Kerala has its own state election.
You can vote using your thumbprint if you cannot sign.
Politicians can make speeches on the day of voting.
There are special lines for senior citizens to vote.
You can vote in two different states.
The election symbol helps people who cannot read.
A person must be 25 years old to be a candidate.
You can change your vote after pressing the button.
Election results are final once the counting is over.
